candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

Balancing line, not a reported current assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Restricted cash should not be preferred for CHE when unrestricted cash and cash equivalents is available.

candidates.why: Cash flow statement line, but balance sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line, preferred over cash flow rollforward lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Bookmark/header, not a reported amount.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Appears within current liabilities section and looks like current borrowings.
Appears within current liabilities section and likely current portion of bond debt.
Current debt-like item but lease-related and should be excluded under the baseline STD rule.
Appears after total current liabilities, so likely non-current and not STD.
Cash flow item, not a balance sheet short-term debt stock.

variables.notes: Chose the current financing liability lines appearing before Total Current Liabilities. Excluded lease liabilities per rule and avoided non-current borrowings.

candidates.why: Most direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Includes taxes but also public duties/payroll-type items, so less clean than a dedicated taxes payable line.

variables.notes: Preferred the dedicated taxes payable row over the broader public duties and taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Best semantic match to total property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; net total is preferred when available.
Also a total tangible assets line, but gross is less preferred than net PPE.
Only a component of PPE.
Only a component of PPE.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the total net tangible assets line as the best PPE proxy. Although preview values are blank, the label is semantically correct and should not be rejected for that reason.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
